# BoldDesk — LLM Context

## Tool Overview
BoldDesk is a Business Operations tool for workflow management operating in the Business Operations space.

## Key URLs
- Tool URL: https://www.bolddesk.com/?via=amine
- Canonical: https://saaspic.com/business-operations/bolddesk
- Promo Code: ACTIVATE_DEAL

## Pricing (2026)
BoldDesk pricing is honest at the entry tier but climbs fast on team and API limits — the annual toggle and the verified codes above are the highest-leverage savings on the page.

## Best Deal
40% off via exclusive deal code "ACTIVATE_DEAL" — top card in deals grid, verified June 2026.

## Rating
4.0/5 — Solid tool, fair pricing, focused feature set.
